steps.title: Put both equations in matching form
steps.content: Rewrite the first equation as $7r-pw=-6$. Rewrite the second as $7r-10w=11$. For the system to have no solution, the $r$- and $w$-coefficients must match proportionally, while the constants are different.

steps.title: Match the coefficients
steps.content: The $r$-coefficients are both $7$, so the scale factor is $1$. Therefore the $w$-coefficients must match: $-p=-10$, so $p=10$.

steps.title: Confirm no solution
steps.content: With $p=10$, the equations have the same left side, $7r-10w$, but different constants, $-6$ and $11$. That creates parallel distinct lines, so the system has no solution. The answer is 10.
